sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى السُّوقِ الْمَحَلِّيِّ لِشِرَاءِ الْخُضَارِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam na lokalnu pijacu da kupim svježe povrće.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the local market to buy fresh vegetables.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ الطَّمَاطِمَ وَالْخِيَارَ وَالْبَصَلَ لِصُنْعِ سَلَطَةٍ لَذِيذَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam paradajz, krastavce i luk za pravljenje ukusne salate.
sentences.translationEn: I bought tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions to make a delicious salad.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْأَسْعَارُ رَخِيصَةً جِدًّا وَالْجَوْدَةُ مُمْتَازَةً.
sentences.translation: Cijene su bile veoma niske, a kvalitet je bio odličan.
sentences.translationEn: The prices were very cheap and the quality was excellent.
